headline: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
summary: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.

raw.headline: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
raw.summary: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.

headline: World Cup betting boom could outweigh early travel concerns
summary: CNBC's Contessa Brewer reports the World Cup could become the biggest betting event ever, while travel demand remains mixed as hotels see softer bookings and Airbnb expects record activity.

raw.headline: World Cup betting boom could outweigh early travel concerns
